features.title: test-automation P4-F2: LLM-judge 语义层(模糊残留+grounding)扩 ai-safety-eval, 带judge评测集+VCR
features.acceptance: 【backlog test-automation roadmap P4-F2(M), 桶C概率部分, 用户已授权 AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY】扩 judge.py(B032)范式为**语义 judge**: (1)模糊英文/混合残留(P4-F1 确定性漏的)+ (2)grounding(解释数值是否 grounded 在给定 quant/data, 无编造). 经 LLMGateway task 路由(禁硬编码模型名, 边界l). ★judge 自身评测集(labeled: 已知残留/未grounded + 已知clean, ≥8例)验 judge 准确率防漂移. ★VCR cassette(conftest filter_headers=[authorization] 自动脱敏 key)录放, CI 离线确定性. ADVISORY(flag 非硬 block), ADDITIVE(不弱化 red-team 硬门, ai-safety-eval 绿). ★key 仅 env(scratchpad/aigc.env)录制用, cassette 脱敏, **绝不 commit key**. Gates: 根ruff+backend ruff/mypy/pytest(safety incl judge评测) + ai-safety-eval CI 绿. Workflow-build(fresh子代理+对抗验证 judge准确率/脱敏/additive).
design_decisions: judge.py(B032)已有LLM-judge范式(AI边界规则); P4-F2扩为语义层(残留+grounding)非重造。
用户授权key→可录真cassette; VCR filter_headers自动脱敏(commit安全)。
judge评测集验准确率=roadmap'防漂移'要求; ADVISORY非硬block=低安全风险。
key仅scratchpad env录制用,绝不commit;cassette脱敏后可commit。

features.title: Codex 独立验收 + signoff(judge准确率/cassette脱敏/additive/red-team门零回归/eval绿)
features.acceptance: Codex独立: 语义judge在评测集准确率(残留+grounding正确分类)+★cassette 无明文key(grep committed cassette 无 pk_/Bearer token)+ADDITIVE(red-team test_ai_advisor_red_team不变+ai-safety-eval绿)+advisory非硬block+task路由无硬编码模型+backend safety pytest绿+无committed key. signoff docs/test-reports/B096-...-signoff.md.
design_decisions: 最大陷阱=cassette漏明文key/judge漂移误判/悄弱化红门;独立核实脱敏+准确率+additive。
